summary: The diff shows minimal changes: a new migration module (backend/migration.mo) and modifications to backend/main.mo and project_state.json. The migration adds candidateName and jobTitle fields to the Interview type. The backend/main.mo shows Interview type updated with candidateName and jobTitle, plus AnalyticsResult type. However, the diff is heavily truncated and no frontend files are present. REQ-23 through REQ-26 all require significant frontend work (pages, charts, forms, React Query integration) and substantial backend analytics endpoints — none of which are visible in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Build an Interviews page with list/calendar toggle, interview scheduling form, edit capability, and mark completed/cancelled actions
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend Interviews page file is present in the diff. Only a backend migration adding candidateName/jobTitle fields to Interview is visible. No list view, calendar toggle, form/dialog, edit, or mark-complete/cancel UI is implemented in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Build an Offers page with offer letter list, generation form with custom clauses, formatted preview panel, and accept/decline actions
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend Offers page file is present in the diff. The OfferLetter type already existed. No new offers UI, form, preview panel, or status update actions are visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Build an Analytics page with line chart (applications over time), donut chart (pipeline stage distribution), bar chart (top jobs by volume), and time-to-hire table
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend Analytics page file is present in the diff. The backend/main.mo is truncated and shows an AnalyticsResult type stub but no analytics query endpoints are confirmed. No charts or data table UI is implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Enhance the Dashboard page with live summary metric cards, pipeline stage bar chart, and top 5 AI-matched candidates list
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend Dashboard page modifications are present in the diff. No summary cards, bar chart, or top candidates ranked list updates are visible.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module (backend/migration.mo) for upgrading Interview records with candidateName and jobTitle fields
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a migration module or any data migration concern. This was added without being requested.
